chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 750 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.4901/2025. 2. For orders on office objection No.1, 2, 3, 22 & 33. 05.03.2025 Mr. Fayaz Ali Pathan, advocate for the petitioner 1. Urgency granted. 2. Serious office objection as to maintainability are denoted on office file, inter alia, no constitutional right appears to have been infringed; recourse is already pending before the competent authority; and most importantly that the petitioner is devoid of any locus standi to maintain this petition. Learned counsel remains unable to satisfy on either account. In view of foregoing, petition is found to be mis-conceived, hence dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
